items.content_html: Obsidian Similarity Toolkit is an experimental plugin for Obsidian that adds semantic embedding similarity calculation to your vault using a fully local embedding model. This allows nodes in your vault graph to be positioned according to their semantic similarity to each other, in addition to the various other dimensions already in the graph.
items.title: Jhgallas/obsidian-similarity: Obsidian Similarity Toolkit is an experimental plugin for Obsidian that adds semantic embedding similarity calculation to your vault using a fully local embedding model. This allows nodes in your vault graph to be positioned according to their semantic similarity to each other, in addition to the various other dimensions already in the graph.

items.content_html: This is an enhancing export plugin base on Pandoc for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md/ ). It's allow you to export to formats like Markdown、Markdown (Hugo https://gohugo.io/ )、Html、docx、Latex etc.
